items.name: awesome-QAI-Papers-QML
items.description: 📚 Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Framework-for-the-Detection-of-Mental-Stress-main
items.description: A real-time Face Emotion Recognition (FER) system that uses a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to detect mental stress levels during online learning environments. The system captures emotional cues from facial expressions to determine stress, enhancing digital mental health monitoring.

items.name: transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: kmeans_nn_ILF_london_smart_meters
items.description: Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

items.name: Predictive-Maintenance-and-Simulation-Framework-for-Aircraft-Fleet-Operations
items.description: This project develops a predictive maintenance framework for aircraft turbofan engines using NASA's C-MAPSS dataset. It combines machine learning (LightGBM) for Remaining Useful Life (RUL) prediction with discrete-event simulation (SimPy) to model the impact of maintenance queue delays on engine fleet health.

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: tensorflow
items.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

items.name: Soil-Metagenome-Classifier
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Taxonomic Classification of Soil Metagenomic Fragments using Canonical k-mer profiles and XGBoost

items.name: financial-distress-prediction-imbalance-aware
items.description: Imbalance-aware machine learning framework for enterprise financial distress prediction using ensemble learning, SMOTE oversampling, and SHAP explainability analysis.

items.name: Paddle
items.description: PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning: Machine Learning Framework from Industrial Practice （『飞桨』核心框架，深度学习&机器学习高性能单机、分布式训练和跨平台部署）

items.name: Cover-Channel-through-DNS-Tunneling
items.description: the project implements a Machine Learning  (ML)-based detection framework that analyzes DNS traffic patterns in real-time. By ex- tracting key statistical features such as subdomain entropy, query frequency, and payload  length, the system employs anomaly detection algorithms to distinguish between benign  requests and malicious tunnels.

items.name: Hybrid-Machine-Learning-and-Ensemble-Approaches-for-Fake-News-Detection
items.description: An explainable fake news detection framework using hybrid feature engineering, stacking ensemble learning, and SHAP analysis. The system combines Logistic Regression, XGBoost, and LightGBM to achieve reliable and high-accuracy text classification on a cleaned and carefully evaluated news dataset.

items.name: ebma-icu-readmission
items.description: Ensemble Bayesian Model Averaging (EBMA)-based framework combining 25 deep learning, machine learning, and clinical scoring models for 30-day ICU readmission prediction on MIMIC-III.

items.name: pontos
items.description: 🛠️ Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: Ignis
items.description: 🔥 Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

items.name: warp
items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: CardioTwin-AI-of-your-heart
items.description: CardioTwin AI is a personalized digital twin framework designed for predictive cardiac health and diagnostic optimization. It integrates a 3D heart model developed in Blender with data-driven machine learning to visualize and analyze heart health. The platform features an AI-powered chatbot within a custom user interface.

items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: Heart-Disease-Classification-Analysis
items.description: This Machine Learning project presents a rigorous, leakage-aware hybrid soft-voting ensemble framework combining k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Random Forest (RF) for heart disease prediction on the UCI Cleveland dataset.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: MitoVeritas
items.description: A machine learning framework for accurate low-frequency mtDNA mutation detection by identifying and removing NUMT-derived artifacts. Integrates DNA-RNA dual-omics and multi-dimensional features to robustly distinguish genuine mitochondrial mutations from nuclear mitochondrial DNA segments (NUMTs) contamination.

items.description: A machine learning-based framework that analyzes Ethereum transaction data to identify suspicious wallet addresses linked to pig butchering scams. The system uses feature extraction and a Random Forest classifier to detect high-risk wallets based on transaction behavior patterns, enabling efficient fraud detection and blockchain investigation.

items.name: DiaPipeline-A-Production-Ready-ML-Framework
